exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your wine collection forward
items: Define your wine collection goals by writing down your budget, preferred regions, and target collection size for the first year
Set up a proper wine storage area with consistent temperature (55-65°F) and humidity control
Research and select 5-10 specific wine regions to focus your collection strategy around your taste preferences and budget constraints
Create a detailed inventory tracking system for recording wine purchases, storage locations, and tasting notes
Research and identify 5 wine regions that align with your taste preferences and collection goals
Map out your storage space requirements by measuring available area and calculating bottle capacity for your planned collection size
